summary: Building the next-generation product data onboarding suite to replace legacy systems and streamline how product information flows into OTTO's platform.
details: Developing Java/Spring Boot microservices for the next-gen product data onboarding platform
Working with event-driven architecture via Apache Kafka for asynchronous, high-throughput data pipelines
Managing cloud infrastructure on AWS with Docker containers and Terraform for infrastructure-as-code
Using MongoDB as the primary data store for flexible, schema-agnostic product data management
Contributing to REST API design and implementation across service boundaries
Collaborating in an agile team actively decommissioning legacy onboarding systems
Day-to-day tooling: Git, Linux, GitHub Actions, IntelliJ IDEA

summary: Backend Java development and quality assurance for enterprise life insurance software, gaining experience in large-scale Java environments with structured release cycles.
details: Maintained and extended Java-based backend modules for enterprise life insurance platforms
Implemented bug fixes and new features across multiple product versions
Conducted functional and regression testing to ensure software quality across releases
Produced technical documentation directly as code using a Docs-as-Code approach
Worked within structured Java EE enterprise environments with long-horizon release cycles
